'''Nok Derrick''' was a freelance [[Gender/Legends|male]] entrepreneur who attempted to get some information about the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to sell it to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], by kidnapping the politician [[Temo Dionisio]]. Then, the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]] rescued Dionisio and detonated a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] in Nok's laboratory, [[Death/Legends|killing]] him instantly.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|6|The Hovel on Terk Street}} {{1st}}
